{
  ProductActivator.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class ProductActivatorRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register() =>
    GeneratedActivators.Register<global::Product>(Create);

  static global::Product Create(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> values)
  {
    var instance = new global::Product();
    if (values.TryGetValue("Name", out var sv0)) instance.Name = (string)sv0!;
    if (values.TryGetValue("Price", out var sv1)) instance.Price = (decimal)sv1!;
    return instance;
  }
},
  ProductColumnAttributes.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class ProductColumnAttributesRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register()
  {
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Product), "Name", new(Heading: "Product Name", Width: 30));
    GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Product), "Price", new(Format: "0.00"));
  }
},
  ProductRowReader.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class ProductRowReaderRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register() =>
    GeneratedRowReaders.Register<global::Product>(ReadRow);

  static global::Product ReadRow(global::DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.Cell?[] cells, string?[]? sharedStrings, global::System.Action<int, string> onError)
  {
    var instance = new global::Product();
    instance.Name = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[0], sharedStrings);
    instance.Price = global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadDecimal(cells[1], sharedStrings, 1, onError);
    return instance;
  }
},
  ProductSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class ProductSheetBuilderExtensions
{
  public static ISheetBuilder<global::Product> NameColumn(
    this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder,
    Action<ColumnConfig<global::Product, string>> configuration)
    => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

  public static void NameHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
    => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
    => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Product, string> value)
    => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
    => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
    => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
    => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

  public static void NameRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, string, string?> value)
    => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
    => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

  public static void NameInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, bool value)
    => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
    => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);

  public static ISheetBuilder<global::Product> PriceColumn(
    this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder,
    Action<ColumnConfig<global::Product, decimal>> configuration)
    => builder.Column(_ => _.Price, configuration);

  public static void PriceHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
    => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Order(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Width(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
    => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Product, decimal> value)
    => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
    => builder.Format(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, string value)
    => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
    => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Price);

  public static void PriceRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, decimal, string?> value)
    => builder.Render(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<global::Product, FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Product>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
    => builder.Filter(_ => _.Price);

  public static void PriceInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder, bool value)
    => builder.Include(_ => _.Price, value);

  public static void PriceExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Product> builder)
    => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Price);
}

}
